nav.gearBrowseDescription: Explore all cameras, lenses, and accessories
nav.gearHallOfFameDescription: The most iconic and influential gear in the history of photography
nav.gearTrendingDescription: The most popular gear based on activity.
nav.toolExifViewerDescription: Inspect EXIF metadata and track shutter count history
nav.toolInstagramPostBuilderDescription: Create Instagram posts with multiple images
nav.learnBasicsDescription: Learn about the basics of photography

footer.description: Sharply is a community-driven platform for sharing and discovering the best gear for your photography and videography needs.
footer.productImagesDisclaimer: Product images © respective manufacturers. Used for editorial and informational purposes only. This site is independent and not affiliated with Nikon, Canon, Sony, or other brands.
footer.amazonAffiliateDisclaimer: As an Amazon Affiliate, Sharply may earn a commission on qualifying purchases made through links to Amazon.

search.dialogDescription: Search for gear, open the best match, or compare two items.

home.heroTitle: Real specs, real reviews, real fast.
home.heroSubtitle: Search for any gear, find specs, and read reviews from both users and experts.
home.aboutDescription: Sharply is a contributor-driven photography platform for personalized comparisons, powered by the web's most comprehensive crowd-sourced specs.
home.newToPhotographyDescription: We've put together a beginners guide to everything you need to know to get started! View our step-by-step guide series.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you’re looking for flew the coop. Try searching for gear, or head back home.

auth.signInSubtitle: Log in or create an account to continue
auth.emailHint: We will send a 6-digit code to this address.
auth.agreeToTerms: By clicking continue, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.agreeToTermsVerify: By continuing, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
auth.verifyHint: This code expires in 10 minutes. Keep this tab open while you verify.
auth.welcomeDescription: You just joined the community leading photography data into the future.
auth.authErrorDefault: An error occurred during sign in.
auth.authErrorEmailUsedDescription: Please sign in with the method you originally used, or contact support if you need help linking accounts.
auth.authErrorProblemSigningIn: There was a problem signing in.
auth.authErrorCallback: There was a problem with the authentication callback. Please try again.
auth.authErrorCreateAccount: Could not create account. Please try again.
auth.authErrorEmailCreateAccount: Could not create account with this email. Please try again.
auth.authErrorEmailSignin: There was a problem sending the sign in email. Please try again.
auth.authErrorCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
auth.authErrorSessionRequired: Please sign in to access this page.
auth.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
auth.emailNotConfiguredDescription: Set {missingVars} to enable magic link sign-in.
auth.emailOtpUnavailable: Email OTP is not available right now.
auth.failedToSendCodeTryAgain: Failed to send code. Please try again.
auth.passkeyFailedDescription: No passkey found. Try email, OAuth, or sign up, then add a passkey in Settings.
auth.otpUnavailable: OTP sign-in is not available right now.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.couldNotVerifyCode: Could not verify code. Please try again.

metadata.siteDescription: Real specs, real reviews, real fast. Sharply is the newest and most comprehensive photography gear database and review platform featuring expert reviews, real specs, and side-by-side comparisons in a modern, minimalist interface.
